recalls.Description:
Electrolux Group has announced a recall affecting specific models of Frigidaire, Frigidaire Gallery, and Frigidaire Professional Gas Ranges. The affected models include FCFG3083AS, FCRG3083AD, FCRG3083AS, GCFG3060BD, GCFG3060BF, GCFG3070BF, GCRG3060BD, GCRG3060BF, PCFG3080AF, FCFG3062AB, FCFG3062AS, FCFG3062AW, FCRG3051BB, FCRG3051BS, FCRG3051BW, FCRG3052BB, FCRG3052BS, FCRG3052BW, FCRG3062AB, FCRG3062AS, FCRG3062AW, FCRG306LAF, and GCFG3059BF, with serial numbers ranging from VF52200000 to VF54399999. Model and serial numbers can be found on a nameplate located in the drawer beneath the oven.

The ovens in these ranges may experience a delayed ignition of the bake burner, which poses a burn hazard to users. It is crucial for consumers to take immediate action regarding this safety issue.
recalls.Title: Electrolux Group Issues Recall for Frigidaire Gas Ranges Due to Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact Electrolux Group at 866-291-7633 from 8:30 am to 8 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email gasovenburnerrecall@electrolux.com, or visit www.GasOvenBurnerRecall.com or www.frigidaire.com and navigate to Recall Information for further details.

Products.Name: Frigidaire Gas Ranges
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 174,800 (In addition, about 5,300 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Frigidaire Range Model PCFG3080AF
Recalled Frigidaire Range Model GCFG3070BF
Recalled Frigidaire Range Model GCRG3060B*, where * can be F or D
Recalled Frigidaire Range Model FCRG3051B*, where * can be S, W, or B

Injuries.Name: Electrolux Group and the CPSC are aware of 62 reports of the oven's bake burner delayed ignition, including 30 reports of burn injuries.

Manufacturers.Name: Electrolux Consumer Products, Inc., of Charlotte, North Carolina

Retailers.Name: Lowe's, The Home Depot, and other retail stores nationwide and online at Frigidaire.com from June 2025 through January 2026 for between $630 and $2,700.

Hazards.Name: Burn hazard due to delayed ignition of the oven's bake burner

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the ovens immediately and reach out to Electrolux Group for a complimentary repair, which includes professional in-home installation of a new bake burner at no cost. The cooktop burners can still be used.

seo.metaDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire Gas Ranges due to burn hazards from delayed ignition. Contact for free repairs and safety information.
seo.ogTitle: Electrolux Group Issues Recall for Frigidaire Gas Ranges Due to Burn Risk
seo.ogDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire Gas Ranges due to burn hazards from delayed ignition. Contact for free repairs and safety information.
seo.twitterTitle: Electrolux Group Issues Recall for Frigidaire Gas Ranges Due to Burn Risk
seo.twitterDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire Gas Ranges due to burn hazards from delayed ignition. Contact for free repairs and safety information.

recalls.Description: Curtis International has broadened its recall to include the Frigidaire 6-can minifridge model EFMIS121, alongside previously recalled models EFMIS129, EFMIS137, EFMIS149, and EFMIS175. These minifridges, identifiable by the 'Frigidaire' logo on the front, have specific serial numbers located on a label at the back. The affected units were sold in red at Target stores. The serial numbers for model EFMIS121 range from A2001 to A2310.
recalls.Title: Curtis International Expands Recall of Frigidaire Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more details, consumers can reach out to Curtis International Ltd. at 888-727-0198 from 8 a.m. to 12 a.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recall@curtiscs.com, or visit www.recallrtr.com/minifridge.

Products.Name: Frigidaire 6-can Minifridge Model EFMIS121
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 330,000, Curtis International previously recalled 634,000 minifridges in July 2024

Images.Caption: Recalled Curtis International Minifridge Model EFMIS121 – serial numbers between A2001 to A2310

Injuries.Name: Curtis International has received at least six reports of the model EFMIS121 minifridges catching fire, with property damages.

Manufacturers.Name: ShangYu North Electron Manufacture Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Sold exclusively at Target stores nationwide and online at Target.com from January 2020 through October 2023 for around $30.

Hazards.Name: Risk of fire and burns due to short-circuiting electrical components

Remedies.Name: Stop using the minifridge, register for a refund, and dispose of the unit safely

seo.metaDescription: Curtis International recalls Frigidaire minifridges due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safely dispose of your unit.
seo.ogTitle: Curtis International Expands Recall of Frigidaire Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.ogDescription: Curtis International recalls Frigidaire minifridges due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safely dispose of your unit.
seo.twitterTitle: Curtis International Expands Recall of Frigidaire Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.twitterDescription: Curtis International recalls Frigidaire minifridges due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safely dispose of your unit.

recalls.Description: Sanven Technology is recalling its Vevor ice crushing machines, which are intended for home use. These machines feature a handle that users press to feed ice into a chute, activating a cutter inside. Marketed as Ice Shavers, Ice Crushers, and Snow Cone Makers, these products are identified by model numbers BY-300 and BY-300 FS and are available in yellow, red, silver, and blue. The brand name 'Vevor' along with the model number can be found on a label on the top of each unit.
recalls.Title: Sanven Technology Issues Recall for Vevor Ice Crushers Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Sanven Technology at 855-599-6320 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or via email at recalling@vevor.com. Additional information is available online at https://www.vevor.com/pages/vevor-ice-shaver-recall or by visiting www.vevor.com and selecting 'Product Recall.'

Products.Name: Vevor Ice Crushers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 11,650 (In addition, about 1,060 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Vevor Ice Crusher, model number BY-300 in yellow (SBY-300FD110V3ZIQV1)
Recalled Vevor Ice Crusher, model number BY-300 in red (SBY-300FD110VE784V1)
Recalled Vevor Ice Crusher, model number BY-300 in silver (SBY-300FD110VLDK1V1)
Recalled Vevor Ice Crusher, model number BY-300FS in blue (SBJBXS220300WRVKAV1)
Recalled Vevor Ice Crusher, model number BY-300FS in silver (SBJBXS220300WSNSVV1)
Recalled Vevor Ice Crusher, model number BY-300FS in red (SBJBXS220300W1L2RV1)
Label on top of Recalled Vevor Ice Crusher

Injuries.Name: Sanven has received two reports of thermal events, including one fire.

Retailers.Name: Online at Vevor.com, Amazon.com, Walmart.com, Wayfair.com, HomeDepot.com and Lowes.com from July 2021 through July 2025 for between $40 and $86.

Distributors.Name: Sanven Technology Ltd., dba Vevor, of Rancho Cucamonga, California

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to potential thermal events

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled ice crusher and contact Sanven for a full refund. Email a photo of the ice crusher with the unplugged power cord cut in half to recalling@vevor.com.

seo.metaDescription: Sanven Technology recalls Vevor Ice Crushers due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.
seo.ogTitle: Sanven Technology Issues Recall for Vevor Ice Crushers Due to Fire Risk
seo.ogDescription: Sanven Technology recalls Vevor Ice Crushers due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.
seo.twitterTitle: Sanven Technology Issues Recall for Vevor Ice Crushers Due to Fire Risk
seo.twitterDescription: Sanven Technology recalls Vevor Ice Crushers due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.

recalls.Description: Tempo USA is recalling all Ambiano electric pressure cookers, including models 93550 (KY-318B), 96775 (KY-318A), and 98527 (6L-PC). These cookers come in six-quart or eight-quart capacities and are identifiable by the Ambiano brand name on the front and a model number on the bottom label. Reports indicate multiple burn injuries linked to these products due to a safety issue with the lid.
recalls.Title: Tempo USA Issues Recall for Ambiano Electric Pressure Cookers Due to Burn Risk; Sold at ALDI
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled pressure cookers immediately. For assistance, contact ALDI at 800-325-7894 from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit https://help.aldi.us/contact-form-product. Alternatively, reach out to Tempo via email at serviceusa@tempo.org or check aldi.us for more details on product recalls.

Images.Caption: Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 93550 (KY-318B)
Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 93550 (KY-318B) Rating Label
Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 96775 (KY-318A
Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 96775 (KY-318A) Rating Label
Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 98527 (6L-PC)
Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 98527 (6L-PC) Rating Label

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 11 reports of incidents, in which the contents were expelled under pressure, including eight reports of severe burn injuries.

Retailers.Name: ALDI retail stores nationwide between January 2016 and December 2019 for about $40.

Importers.Name: Tempo International (USA) Inc., of Aventura, Florida

Hazards.Name: Risk of burn injuries due to premature lid opening before steam pressure is released.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the cookers and contact Tempo or ALDI for a refund. They can return the cooker to any ALDI store for a full refund or email Tempo with a photo of the unplugged cooker and its model number for further instructions.

seo.metaDescription: Tempo USA recalls Ambiano electric pressure cookers due to burn risks. Contact ALDI or Tempo for refunds and safety information.
seo.ogTitle: Tempo USA Issues Recall for Ambiano Electric Pressure Cookers Due to Burn Risk; Sold at ALDI
seo.ogDescription: Tempo USA recalls Ambiano electric pressure cookers due to burn risks. Contact ALDI or Tempo for refunds and safety information.
seo.twitterTitle: Tempo USA Issues Recall for Ambiano Electric Pressure Cookers Due to Burn Risk; Sold at ALDI
seo.twitterDescription: Tempo USA recalls Ambiano electric pressure cookers due to burn risks. Contact ALDI or Tempo for refunds and safety information.

recalls.Description: Wuensche USA is recalling all Ambiano Cotton Candy Makers, model number 836098, which feature a red or teal base and a clear plastic cover. The product is identifiable by the 'Ambiano' branding and model number displayed on both the packaging and the bottom of the unit. This recall is prompted by a potential fire hazard associated with the heating element. If the cotton candy maker is used without the designated sugar receptacle, it may cause sugar to ignite.
recalls.Title: Wuensche USA Issues Recall for Ambiano Cotton Candy Makers Due to Fire Risk; Available at ALDI
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are advised to stop using the recalled cotton candy maker immediately. For assistance, contact ALDI at (800) 325-7894 from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, visit https://help.aldi.us/contact-form-product, or email Wuensche USA at service@801service.net. Additional information can be found by visiting aldi.us and selecting 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Ambiano Cotton Candy Maker – Red
Recalled Ambiano Cotton Candy Maker – Teal
Recalled Ambiano Cotton Candy Maker – Rating Label

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 12 reports of sparking or fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: ALDI retail stores nationwide between August 2024 and September 2024 for $15.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to potential ignition of sugar when used without the sugar receptacle.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use and contact Wuensche or ALDI for a refund. Return the intact cotton candy maker to any ALDI store for a full refund or email Wuensche with a photo of the unplugged device and model details.

seo.metaDescription: Wuensche USA recalls Ambiano Cotton Candy Makers due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact ALDI for refunds.
seo.ogTitle: Wuensche USA Issues Recall for Ambiano Cotton Candy Makers Due to Fire Risk; Available at ALDI
seo.ogDescription: Wuensche USA recalls Ambiano Cotton Candy Makers due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact ALDI for refunds.
seo.twitterTitle: Wuensche USA Issues Recall for Ambiano Cotton Candy Makers Due to Fire Risk; Available at ALDI
seo.twitterDescription: Wuensche USA recalls Ambiano Cotton Candy Makers due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact ALDI for refunds.

recalls.Description: Epoca International has announced a recall of the Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridges, available in 4-liter and 10-liter sizes, sold in various colors including pink, white, aqua, and hot pink. The affected models were produced before August 2024 and can be identified by their serial numbers located on the back or bottom of the units. The Paris Hilton branding is typically found on the door's lower right corner or the top middle, depending on the unit.
recalls.Title: Epoca International Issues Recall for Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should contact Epoca International at 888-262-3905 from 9 a.m. to 3 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recall@epoca.com, or visit www.epoca.com/minifridgerecall for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridge (pink)
Recalled Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridge (white)
Recalled Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridge (aqua)

Injuries.Name: The firm is aware of 27 reports of the mini fridge overheating and catching on fire. No injuries have been reported. Property damage has included damage to the unit and surrounding surfaces.

Retailers.Name: Walmart, Ross and online at Walmart.com and Amazon.com and other e-commerce sites from November 2022 through July 2025. The 4-liter model sold for approximately $30, and the 10-liter model sold for approximately $60.

Importers.Name: Epoca International LLC, of Boca Raton, Florida

Hazards.Name: Electrical switch can short circuit, leading to overheating and posing fire and burn hazards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the fridge, unplug it, and register for the recall online. To obtain a refund, complete the online form and submit three photos as specified.

seo.metaDescription: Recall alert: Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridges recalled due to fire and burn hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safety information.
seo.ogTitle: Epoca International Issues Recall for Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.ogDescription: Recall alert: Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridges recalled due to fire and burn hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safety information.
seo.twitterTitle: Epoca International Issues Recall for Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.twitterDescription: Recall alert: Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridges recalled due to fire and burn hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safety information.

recalls.Description: Curtis International is recalling specific models of Frigidaire minifridges due to potential fire and burn hazards. These units, identifiable by the 'Frigidaire' label on the front, include models EFMIS129, EFMIS137, EFMIS149, and EFMIS175, with affected serial numbers listed below. The minifridges were available in various colors and sizes, specifically 6- and 9-Can capacities. Consumers should check their units against the provided serial numbers to determine if they are part of the recall.
recalls.Title: Curtis International Issues Recall for Frigidaire Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks; Over $700,000 in Property Damage Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Curtis International Ltd. at 888-727-0198 from 8 a.m. to 12 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recall@curtiscs.com, or visit www.recallrtr.com/minifridge.

Products.Name: Frigidaire Minifridge Model EFMIS129 (specific serial numbers only)

Images.Caption: Recalled Curtis International Minifridge Model EFMIS129 - serial numbers between A2001 to A2308 – except for model numbers containing "EFMIS129-B" or "EFMIS129-C"
Recalled Curtis International Minifridge Model EFMIS137 - serial numbers between A2001 to A2312
Recalled Curtis International Minifridge Model EFMIS149 - serial numbers between A2001 to A2308
Recalled Curtis International Minifridge Model EFMIS175 - serial numbers between A2001 to A2310

Injuries.Name: Curtis International has received at least 26 reports of the minifridges smoking, sparking, burning, melting, overheating and catching fire, with property damages totaling more than $700,000. Two consumers reported smoke inhalation injuries.

Manufacturers.Name: ShangYu North Electron Manufacture Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Walmart and other stores nationwide and online at Walmart.com and Amazon.com from January 2020 through December 2023 for between $36 and $40.

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazards due to potential short circuiting of internal electrical components.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease use of the recalled minifridges and follow refund instructions at www.recallrtr.com/minifridge. Unplug the unit, cut the power cord, and mark 'Recall' on the front door before disposing of the minifridge according to local regulations.

seo.metaDescription: Curtis International recalls Frigidaire minifridges due to fire hazards. Check your model and serial numbers for safety.
seo.ogTitle: Curtis International Issues Recall for Frigidaire Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks; Over $700,000 in Property Damage Reported
seo.ogDescription: Curtis International recalls Frigidaire minifridges due to fire hazards. Check your model and serial numbers for safety.
seo.twitterTitle: Curtis International Issues Recall for Frigidaire Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks; Over $700,000 in Property Damage Reported
seo.twitterDescription: Curtis International recalls Frigidaire minifridges due to fire hazards. Check your model and serial numbers for safety.

recalls.Description: AstroAI is recalling its 4-Liter/6-Can minifridges due to potential fire and burn hazards linked to an electrical switch that may short circuit. The affected minifridges feature the AstroAI logo on the front, with model number 'LY0204A' and specific serial numbers beginning with 'S/N' followed by 19, 20, 21, 2201, 2202, or 2203, located on a label at the back of the unit. These minifridges measure approximately 9.45 inches in diameter, 6.9 inches wide, and 10 inches high, and were available in various colors including black, white, blue, and pink.
recalls.Title: AstroAI Recalls 4-Liter/6-Can Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach AstroAI at 877-278-7624 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday to Friday, email recall@astroai.com, or visit https://www.astroai.com/product-recall or www.astroai.com and navigate to the 'Recalls' section for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled AstroAI 4-Liter/6-Can Minifridge
Recalled AstroAI 4-Liter/6-Can Minifridge label

Injuries.Name: CPSC has received at least 70 reports of the minifridges smoking, burning, melting or catching fire. Two fires resulted in extensive property damages, together totaling more than $360,000 in reported damages.

Manufacturers.Name: Shaoxing ShangYu North Electron Manufacture Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Online at Amazon.com and Astroai.com from June 2019 through June 2022 for about $40.

Importers.Name: AstroAI Corp., of Garden Grove, California

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazards due to electrical switch short circuiting

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the minifridges and contact AstroAI for a free replacement. To obtain a replacement, send a photo of the minifridge showing the model and serial number, marked 'Recalled' in permanent marker, to AstroAI via email at recall@astroai.com or through their online portal. Dispose of the recalled units according to local waste disposal regulations.

seo.metaDescription: AstroAI recalls 4-Liter/6-Can minifridges due to fire risks. Stop using them and contact for a free replacement.
seo.ogTitle: AstroAI Recalls 4-Liter/6-Can Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.ogDescription: AstroAI recalls 4-Liter/6-Can minifridges due to fire risks. Stop using them and contact for a free replacement.
seo.twitterTitle: AstroAI Recalls 4-Liter/6-Can Minifridges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.twitterDescription: AstroAI recalls 4-Liter/6-Can minifridges due to fire risks. Stop using them and contact for a free replacement.

recalls.Description: SharkNinja is recalling all Ninja Foodi OP300 Series Multi-Function Pressure Cookers due to a potential burn hazard. These cookers, which feature pressure cooking and air frying capabilities, are available in black with a 6.5-quart capacity. The brand name 'Ninja' is visible on the front and product label. Models affected include OP300, OP301, OP301A, OP302, OP302BRN, OP302HCN, OP302HAQ, OP302HW, OP302HB, OP305, OP305CO, and OP350CO, all of which are labeled on the side of the unit. Note that any OP300 series replacement lids purchased separately are also part of this recall.
recalls.Title: SharkNinja Recalls 1.8 Million Foodi Multi-Function Pressure Cookers Due to Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach SharkNinja at 888-370-1733 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET Monday through Friday and 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET Saturday, email sharkninja@rqa-inc.com, or visit https://www.rqa-inc.com/client/SharkNinja/ or www.ninjakitchen.com and select 'Recalls' under 'Support' at the top of the page.

Products.Name: Ninja Foodi OP300 Series Multi-Function Pressure Cookers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 1,846,400 (In addition, about 184,240 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled SharkNinja Foodi OP300 Series Multi-Function Pressure Cooker
Recalled SharkNinja Foodi OP300 Series Multi-Function Pressure Cooker - Front of Packaging

Injuries.Name: SharkNinja has received 106 reports of burn injuries, including more than 50 reports of second- or third-degree burns to the face or body, with 26 lawsuits filed.

Retailers.Name: Walmart, Costco, Sam's Club, Amazon and Target stores nationwide, and online at www.Ninjakitchen.com, www.walmart.com, www.costco.com, www.samsclub.com, www.amazon.com and www.target.com from January 2019 through March 2025 for about $200.

Importers.Name: SharkNinja Operating LLC, of Needham, Massachusetts

Hazards.Name: Risk of burn injuries due to the pressure-cooking lid being opened during use

Remedies.Name: Stop using the pressure-cooking function and contact SharkNinja for a free replacement lid; other functions can still be used.

seo.metaDescription: SharkNinja recalls 1.8 million Foodi Multi-Function Pressure Cookers due to burn hazards. Contact for a free replacement lid.
seo.ogTitle: SharkNinja Recalls 1.8 Million Foodi Multi-Function Pressure Cookers Due to Burn Risk

seo.twitterDescription: SharkNinja recalls 1.8 million Foodi Multi-Function Pressure Cookers due to burn hazards. Contact for a free replacement lid.

recalls.Description: Sakar is recalling Vivitar Blender Bottles due to a potential laceration hazard. These bottles are constructed from clear plastic and feature a white plastic base and top. Each bottle is marked with "VIVITAR," "Description: Blender Bottle," "ITEM: ES15-BB-TA," and "MID #5220824" on a sticker located beneath the base, with the latter also stamped on the underside.
recalls.Title: Sakar Issues Recall for Vivitar Blender Bottles Due to Laceration Risk; Available Only at Target
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Sakar at 800-592-9541 anytime, email support@sakar.com, or visit https://www.vivitar.com/pages/recalls. You can also access their website at https://www.vivitar.com and click on "Recalls" at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Vivitar Blender Bottle
VIVITAR, "Description: Blender Bottle," "ITEM: ES15-BB-TA" and "MID #5220824" located under the white plastic base of the bottle

Injuries.Name: The firm has received one report where the consumer was able to remove the bottle from the base while the blades were engaged. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Target stores nationwide and online at Target.com from December 2024 through January 2025 for about $5.

Importers.Name: Sakar International Inc., of Edison, New Jersey

Hazards.Name: Blender blades can operate without the bottle attached, creating a laceration risk.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the affected blender bottles and reach out to Sakar for a full refund, either as a $5 Target gift card or a check, along with a pre-paid return shipping label. The recalled items must be returned to Sakar for the refund. No proof of purchase is necessary. Do not return the bottles to Target stores. Sakar is reaching out to all known buyers.

seo.metaDescription: Sakar recalls Vivitar Blender Bottles due to a laceration hazard. Learn how to get a refund and return instructions.
seo.ogTitle: Sakar Issues Recall for Vivitar Blender Bottles Due to Laceration Risk; Available Only at Target

seo.twitterDescription: Sakar recalls Vivitar Blender Bottles due to a laceration hazard. Learn how to get a refund and return instructions.

recalls.Description: Sensio has announced a recall of the Bella Pro Series Steam Espresso Maker (Model 90195) and Cooks Steam Espresso Makers (Model 22395). These espresso machines, featuring a black design with stainless steel accents, measure approximately six inches in width and twelve inches in height. The brand names 'Bella Pro Series' or 'Cooks' can be found on the steaming chamber, with the model number labeled as the 'Item' number on a sticker located underneath the unit.
recalls.Title: Sensio Issues Recall for Bella Pro Series and Cooks Steam Espresso Machines Due to Burn and Laceration Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach Sensio at 855-647-3125 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit www.bellakitchenware.com and navigate to the 'Recalls' section for additional information.

Products.Name: Bella Pro Series Steam Espresso Maker

Images.Caption: Recalled Bella Pro Series Espresso machine
Recalled Cooks Espresso machine

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 18 reports of the handles ejecting, eight of which reported burn and/or laceration injuries.

Retailers.Name: JCPenney stores nationwide and online at BestBuy.com and JCPenney.com from August 2023 through January 2025 for between $40 and $60.

Hazards.Name: Risk of burn and laceration due to forceful ejection of brew cup handle

Remedies.Name: Stop using the espresso machines and contact Sensio for a refund

seo.metaDescription: Sensio recalls Bella Pro Series and Cooks Steam Espresso Machines due to burn and laceration hazards. Learn how to get a refund.
seo.ogTitle: Sensio Issues Recall for Bella Pro Series and Cooks Steam Espresso Machines Due to Burn and Laceration Risks

recalls.Description: LG has issued a recall for its Slide-In and Freestanding Electric Ranges due to a potential fire hazard. The issue arises from front-mounted knobs that can be unintentionally activated by contact from people or pets. This recall includes various model and serial numbers, which can be found inside the oven door or in the storage drawer at the bottom of the oven. The affected ranges were manufactured in Mexico and Korea.
recalls.Title: LG Recalls Electric Ranges Due to Fire Risk from Front-Mounted Knobs
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to LG at 800-399-3265, available from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, Monday to Friday. You can also email lgrange.recall@lge.com or visit https://lgecares.com/rangerecall to request a free warning sticker and receive instructions on its placement and usage of the Control Lock feature.

Images.Caption: Recalled LG Range Model LDE4411
Recalled LG Range Model LDE4413
Recalled LG Range Model LSE4613
Recalled LG Range Model LSEL6333
Recalled LG Range Model LSEL6333
Recalled LG Range Model LSEL6335
Recalled LG Range Model LSEL6337
Recalled LG Range Model LTE4815
Recalled LG Range Model LRE4215

Injuries.Name: The firm has received three reports of the lithium-ion batteries igniting, resulting in smoke and fire damage to walls and floors. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: LG Electronics Inc., of South Korea

Retailers.Name: Best Buy, Costco, The Home Depot, Lowe's, and other appliance stores nationwide and online at LG.com. Depending upon the model, the ranges were sold from 2015 through January 2025 for between $1,400 and $2,650.

Importers.Name: LG Electronics USA Inc., of Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey

Hazards.Name: Risk of fire due to accidental activation of front-mounted knobs

Remedies.Name: Free warning label and usage instructions for the Control Lock feature

seo.metaDescription: LG recalls electric ranges due to fire hazard from front-mounted knobs. Contact LG for a free warning label and safety instructions.
seo.ogTitle: LG Recalls Electric Ranges Due to Fire Risk from Front-Mounted Knobs
seo.ogDescription: LG recalls electric ranges due to fire hazard from front-mounted knobs. Contact LG for a free warning label and safety instructions.
seo.twitterTitle: LG Recalls Electric Ranges Due to Fire Risk from Front-Mounted Knobs
seo.twitterDescription: LG recalls electric ranges due to fire hazard from front-mounted knobs. Contact LG for a free warning label and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Wolf Appliance is recalling its Dual Fuel ranges equipped with infrared griddles due to potential burn and fire hazards. These stainless steel ranges come in sizes of 36, 48, and 60 inches wide, featuring oven door panels in white, black, or stainless steel. The model and serial numbers can be found on the rating plate located beneath the oven's top. The affected ranges include serial numbers ranging from 18517201 to 18868311 and specific model numbers listed in the recall.
recalls.Title: Wolf Dual Fuel Ranges with Infrared Griddles Recalled for Burn and Fire Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Wolf Appliance at 800-200-7820 from 8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, via email at support@wolfappliance.com, or visit www.wolfappliance.com/recall or www.subzero-wolf.com and select "Important Recall Information" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Wolf Dual Fuel Ranges with Infrared Griddles
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 44,000 (In addition, about 1,400 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Wolf Dual Fuel range with infrared griddle (front)
Recalled Wolf Dual Fuel range with infrared griddle (top)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 36 reports of griddles turning on. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Wolf Appliance Inc., of Madison, Wisconsin

Retailers.Name: Home appliance stores nationwide from August 2020 through September 2024 for between $12,500 and $23,000.

Hazards.Name: Risk of burn and fire due to potential short-circuiting from spilled liquids.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the ranges and contact Wolf Appliance for a complimentary in-home repair.

seo.metaDescription: Wolf recalls Dual Fuel ranges with infrared griddles due to burn and fire hazards. Contact Wolf Appliance for a free repair.
seo.ogTitle: Wolf Dual Fuel Ranges with Infrared Griddles Recalled for Burn and Fire Risks
seo.ogDescription: Wolf recalls Dual Fuel ranges with infrared griddles due to burn and fire hazards. Contact Wolf Appliance for a free repair.
seo.twitterTitle: Wolf Dual Fuel Ranges with Infrared Griddles Recalled for Burn and Fire Risks
seo.twitterDescription: Wolf recalls Dual Fuel ranges with infrared griddles due to burn and fire hazards. Contact Wolf Appliance for a free repair.

recalls.Description: ALDI has announced a recall of the Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker due to a serious burn hazard. The coffee makers, available in gray, blue, pink, and purple, measure approximately 11 inches in length, 4.7 inches in width, and 12 inches in height. The Ambiano branding is visible on the side of the unit. Model numbers and UPC codes can be found on the rating label located on the bottom of the coffee maker.
recalls.Title: ALDI Issues Recall for Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers Due to Potential Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can contact ALDI at 888-770-7124 from 8:30 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit www.recallrtr.com/aldicoffeemaker or corporate.aldi.us, navigating to "Newsroom" and then "Product Recalls" for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker (Blue)
Recalled Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker (Gray)
Recalled Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker (Pink)
Recalled Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker (Purple)

Injuries.Name: ALDI has received 25 reports of the recalled coffeemakers expelling hot water from the top of the machine, including three reports of burns.

Retailers.Name: Aldi grocery stores in 38 states and the District of Columbia from July 2023 through September 2023 for about $50.

Hazards.Name: Risk of hot water expulsion leading to burns

Remedies.Name: Stop using the coffee maker immediately and return it to ALDI for a full refund or opt for a $75 electronic gift card by registering online.

seo.metaDescription: ALDI recalls Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers due to burn hazards. Learn how to return for a refund or receive a gift card.
seo.ogTitle: ALDI Issues Recall for Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers Due to Potential Burn Risk
seo.ogDescription: ALDI recalls Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers due to burn hazards. Learn how to return for a refund or receive a gift card.
seo.twitterTitle: ALDI Issues Recall for Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers Due to Potential Burn Risk
seo.twitterDescription: ALDI recalls Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers due to burn hazards. Learn how to return for a refund or receive a gift card.

recalls.Description: SMEG USA is recalling its retro style refrigerators with model numbers beginning with FAB38U due to a safety concern. These refrigerators, measuring approximately 28 inches in width, 30 inches in depth, and 80 inches in height, were available in various colors including black, cream, pastel blue, pastel green, red, and white. They feature either left or right-opening doors and come equipped with three adjustable glass shelves and two drawers, along with a bottom freezer that has a separate door and three drawers. The brand name "SMEG" is displayed on the front, and a label inside the top door contains the model and serial numbers starting with 2781.
recalls.Title: SMEG USA Issues Recall for Retro Refrigerators Due to Potential Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to SMEG USA at 888-763-4782, available from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. They can also email recall@smegusa.com or visit https://www.smeg.com/us/recall or www.smeg.com and navigate to the "Recalls" section for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled SMEG refrigerator
"Made in Italy", the model, and serial numbers are printed on a white label inside of the refrigerator's top door

Injuries.Name: The firm has received nine reports of the refrigerator door falling off. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Independent kitchen and appliance stores nationwide and online at www.williams-sonoma.com, https://www.ajmadison.com and www.wayfair.com from September 2020 through January 2024 for about $4,300.

Importers.Name: SMEG USA Inc., of New York

Hazards.Name: Risk of refrigerator door detachment and potential injury

Remedies.Name: Stop using the refrigerators and contact SMEG USA for a free repair by a certified technician. Consumers will need to email a photo of the refrigerator's model and serial number to recall@smegusa.com.

seo.metaDescription: SMEG USA recalls retro refrigerators due to injury risks from door detachment. Contact for repairs and safety information.
seo.ogTitle: SMEG USA Issues Recall for Retro Refrigerators Due to Potential Injury Risk
seo.ogDescription: SMEG USA recalls retro refrigerators due to injury risks from door detachment. Contact for repairs and safety information.
seo.twitterTitle: SMEG USA Issues Recall for Retro Refrigerators Due to Potential Injury Risk
seo.twitterDescription: SMEG USA recalls retro refrigerators due to injury risks from door detachment. Contact for repairs and safety information.

recalls.Description: Samsung has issued a recall for specific Electric Slide-In Ranges due to a potential fire hazard. The affected models can be identified by their model numbers, which are located on the inside upper left corner of the oven door or within the storage bin at the bottom of the oven. A comprehensive list of the recalled model numbers is provided below for consumer reference.
recalls.Title: Samsung Recalls Electric Slide-In Ranges Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Samsung at 833-775-0120 from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email rangesupport@sea.samsung.com, or visit samsung.com/us/support/range-knob-kit to request free knob locks.

Images.Caption: Samsung Slide-In Electric Range Model NE58F9500SS/AA
Samsung Slide-In Electric Range Model NE63A8711QN/AA
Samsung Electric Range Model NE58K9850WS/AA
Samsung Electric Range Model NE63T8111SS/AA

Injuries.Name: Samsung has received over 300 reports of unintentional activation of the front-mounted knobs by humans or pets since 2013. These ranges have been involved in approximately 250 fires. At least 18 fires caused extensive property damage. Approximately 40 injuries have been reported, eight of which required medical attention, and there have been reports of seven fires involving pet deaths.

Manufacturers.Name: Samsung Electronics America Inc., of Ridgefield Park, N.J.

Retailers.Name: Best Buy, Costco, The Home Depot, Lowe's and other appliance stores nationwide, and online at Samsung.com. Depending upon the model, the ranges were sold from May 2013 through August 2024 for between $1,250 and $3,050.

Hazards.Name: Accidental activation of front-mounted knobs can lead to fire hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to contact Samsung for free knob locks or covers for their electric slide-in ranges. It's important to keep children and pets away from the knobs, ensure they are turned off before leaving the home or going to sleep, and avoid leaving objects on the range when not in use. For Wi-Fi enabled models, users can activate the 'Cooktop On' notification via the Samsung SmartThings app to receive alerts on their smartphones when a burner is on.

seo.metaDescription: Samsung recalls Electric Slide-In Ranges due to fire risks. Contact Samsung for free knob locks and safety tips.
seo.ogTitle: Samsung Recalls Electric Slide-In Ranges Due to Fire Risk
seo.ogDescription: Samsung recalls Electric Slide-In Ranges due to fire risks. Contact Samsung for free knob locks and safety tips.
seo.twitterTitle: Samsung Recalls Electric Slide-In Ranges Due to Fire Risk
seo.twitterDescription: Samsung recalls Electric Slide-In Ranges due to fire risks. Contact Samsung for free knob locks and safety tips.

recalls.Description: Vitamix has expanded its recall of the Ascent and Venturist Series blending containers, which include 8-ounce and 20-ounce sizes, along with blade bases. This recall affects all units, including those previously repaired in August 2018. The blending containers are clear, while the blade bases are black, and they are compatible with various Vitamix blenders such as the Venturist V1200 and Ascent A2300, A2500, A3300, and A3500 models. The Vitamix logo is visible on the containers.
recalls.Title: Vitamix Expands Recall of Ascent and Venturist Series Blending Containers Due to Laceration Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Vitamix at 855-215-5178 from 7 a.m. to 4 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email service@vitamix.com. More information is available at www.BlendingCupBowlRecall.expertinquiry.com or by visiting https://www.vitamix.com/us/en_us and selecting 'Product Recalls' at the top of the page.

Products.Name: Vitamix Ascent® Series and Venturist® Series Blending Containers and Blade Bases
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 569,000 (In August 2018, 105,000 of the 569,000 blending containers and blade bases were previously recalled) (In addition, about 121,950 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Vitamix Ascent Series and Venturist Series 8-ounce Blending Container
Recalled Vitamix Ascent Series and Venturist Series 20-ounce Blending Container
Recalled Vitamix Ascent Series and Venturist Series Blade Base

Injuries.Name: Vitamix has received 27 reports of lacerations, including 11 reports from the prior 2018 recall, when consumers' hands came in contact with exposed blades.

Retailers.Name: Costco, Best Buy, Crate & Barrel, Macy's, Target, Williams Sonoma, Walmart and specialty and independent stores nationwide, and online at Vitamix.com, Amazon.com and QVC.com from April 2017 through May 2024 for between $30 and $990 for the blender and blending containers when sold with other products.

Hazards.Name: Laceration hazard due to blade exposure from container separation

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the recalled blending containers and blade bases immediately and contact Vitamix for a repair kit that includes a protective shroud and instructional labels.

seo.metaDescription: Vitamix recalls Ascent and Venturist blending containers due to laceration hazards. Contact for repair kit details.
seo.ogTitle: Vitamix Expands Recall of Ascent and Venturist Series Blending Containers Due to Laceration Risk
seo.ogDescription: Vitamix recalls Ascent and Venturist blending containers due to laceration hazards. Contact for repair kit details.
seo.twitterTitle: Vitamix Expands Recall of Ascent and Venturist Series Blending Containers Due to Laceration Risk
seo.twitterDescription: Vitamix recalls Ascent and Venturist blending containers due to laceration hazards. Contact for repair kit details.

recalls.Description: Electrolux Group has reannounced a recall affecting Frigidaire and Kenmore Elite smooth-top electric ranges due to potential fire and burn hazards. These ranges, featuring rear panel rotary knobs and digital displays, were sold in various colors including white, bisque, black, and stainless steel. Consumers can find the brand name, model, and serial number on the drawer frame at the bottom of the unit when opened. The recall includes specific models and serial number ranges for Frigidaire and Kenmore Elite products.
recalls.Title: Electrolux Group Expands Recall of Frigidaire and Kenmore Electric Ranges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact Electrolux Group at 888-845-8226 from 8:30 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. They can also reach out via email at potentiometerrecall@electrolux.com or visit https://www.ema-recall.com/potentiometer or www.potentiometerrecall.com. More details are available at www.frigidaire.com under the "Recall Information" section.

Products.Name: Frigidaire and Kenmore Smooth-top Electric Ranges
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 203,000 (The ranges were previously recalled in August 2009)

Images.Caption: Recalled Frigidaire Smooth-top Freestanding Electric Range: Model PLEFMZ99GC

Injuries.Name: Since the recall was announced in August 2009, Electrolux has received at least 212 reports of the ranges behaving erratically, including 14 reports of fires and eight reports of injuries involving burns to hands or arms, as well as smoke inhalation.

Manufacturers.Name: Electrolux Home Products Inc., of Charlotte, North Carolina

Retailers.Name: Sears and independent appliance stores nationwide from June 2001 through August 2009 for between $1,000 and $2,500.

Hazards.Name: Potential for surface heating elements to activate unexpectedly, fail to turn off, or heat inconsistently, leading to fire and burn hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should contact Electrolux or register online for the recall. Based on the serial number, it will be determined if the range can be repaired. Those with affected ranges should not leave items on the range when not in use. Free inspections and repairs will be provided for repairable ranges. If repair is not possible, consumers will receive a $50 electronic gift card and reimbursement for haul-away fees up to $60, upon proof of purchase for a new range.

seo.metaDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire and Kenmore electric ranges due to fire and burn hazards. Contact for repairs or refunds.
seo.ogTitle: Electrolux Group Expands Recall of Frigidaire and Kenmore Electric Ranges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.ogDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire and Kenmore electric ranges due to fire and burn hazards. Contact for repairs or refunds.
seo.twitterTitle: Electrolux Group Expands Recall of Frigidaire and Kenmore Electric Ranges Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.twitterDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire and Kenmore electric ranges due to fire and burn hazards. Contact for repairs or refunds.

recalls.Description:
True Manufacturing has announced a recall for its commercial refrigerators equipped with Secop compressors, specifically those with model number NLE11MN. These refrigerators, available in black and stainless steel finishes, were sold primarily to commercial customers and food service companies. The model and serial numbers can be found on a label inside the refrigerator cabinet near the left door. A variety of models and serial numbers are affected by this recall. 

The affected models include GDIM-49NT, GDM-45, GDM-47, GDM-47FC, GDM-47RL, GDM-49, GDM-49FC, GDM-49RL, GDM-69, GDM-69FC, GDM-72, GDM-72FC, T-49G, TSD-47, and TSD-47G, with serial numbers ranging from 9466976 to 10049972. Consumers are urged to check their units against the recall list to ensure safety.
recalls.Title: True Manufacturing Issues Recall for Commercial Refrigerators with Secop Compressors Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact True Manufacturing toll-free at 855-203-0185 from 8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT Monday through Friday, or email info@true-secopcompressor-retrofit.com. Visit www.true-secopcompressor-retrofit.com or www.true-secopcompressor-recall.com for further details, or go to www.truemfg.com and select the 'Recall' quick link.

Products.Name: Commercial Refrigerators with Secop Compressors
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 29,200 (In addition, about 50 were sold in Mexico)

Images.Caption: Recalled True Commercial Refrigerator with Secop Compressors, model number T-49G
Recalled True Commercial Refrigerator with Secop Compressors, model number GDIM-49NT
Recalled True Commercial Refrigerator with Secop Compressors, model number GDM-72
Recalled True Commercial Refrigerator with Secop Compressors, model number GDM GDM-49
Recalled True Commercial Refrigerator with Secop Compressors, model number TSD-47
SECOP Compressor with model number NLE11MN

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 14 reports of fires resulting in property damage. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: True Manufacturing Co. Inc., of O'Fallon, Missouri (refrigerators)

Retailers.Name: Directly to commercial food service businesses by dealers and distributors from January 2018 through June 2020 for between $3,000 and $8,000.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to potential compressor overheating

Remedies.Name: Free repair by replacing the original Secop ePTC starter with a CSIR motor configuration

seo.metaDescription: True Manufacturing recalls commercial refrigerators with Secop compressors due to fire hazards. Check your model and serial number for safety.
seo.ogTitle: True Manufacturing Issues Recall for Commercial Refrigerators with Secop Compressors Due to Fire Risk

recalls.Description: Best Buy is recalling Insignia Air Fryers and Air Fryer Ovens due to potential hazards. The affected models include NS-AF34D2, NS-AF5DSS2, NS-AF5MSS2, NS-AF8DBD2, NS-AF10DBK2, and NS-AF10DSS2. Each unit features the INSIGNIA brand name on the front or top, with model numbers located on the underside. These appliances have cooking capacities ranging from approximately 3.4 to 10 quarts and come in various finishes, including black and stainless steel.
recalls.Title: Best Buy Issues Recall for Insignia® Air Fryers and Air Fryer Ovens Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Customers should immediately stop using the recalled products and contact Best Buy at 800-566-7498 between 7 a.m. and 6 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. They can also register online at https://www.recallrtr.com/airfryer for a refund. For further details, visit http://www.bestbuy.com/product/recalls or go to www.bestbuy.com and select 'Product Recalls' under 'Order and Purchase' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Insignia Air Fryers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 187,400 (In addition, about 99,900 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Insignia 3.4-qt. Digital Air Fryer model NS-AF34D2
Recalled Insignia 5-qt. Digital Air Fryer model NS-AF5DSS2
Recalled Insignia 5-qt. Digital Air Fryer model NS-AF5MSS2
Recalled Insignia 8-qt. Air Fryer Dual Basket model NS-AF8DBD2
Recalled Insignia 10-qt. Digital Air Fryer Oven model NS-AF10DBK2 (black)
Recalled Insignia 10-qt. Digital Air Fryer Oven model NS-AF10DSS2 (stainless steel)
Product rating label on the underside of the unit showing INSIGNIA brand and the model number

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 24 reports of overheating/melting or glass shattering, including six reports of air fryers catching on fire. No injuries or property damage have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Best Buy stores nationwide and online at www.bestbuy.com, www.eBay.com, and third-party sellers from November 2021 through November 2023 for between $32 and $180.

Importers.Name: Best Buy Purchasing LLC, of Richfield, Minnesota

Hazards.Name: Overheating leading to melted or broken handles, causing fire and burn risks

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled units and visit https://www.recallrtr.com/airfryer for submission instructions and refunds

seo.metaDescription: Best Buy recalls Insignia Air Fryers and Ovens due to serious fire and burn hazards. Stop using and contact Best Buy for refunds.
seo.ogTitle: Best Buy Issues Recall for Insignia® Air Fryers and Air Fryer Ovens Due to Fire and Burn Risks
seo.ogDescription: Best Buy recalls Insignia Air Fryers and Ovens due to serious fire and burn hazards. Stop using and contact Best Buy for refunds.

seo.twitterDescription: Best Buy recalls Insignia Air Fryers and Ovens due to serious fire and burn hazards. Stop using and contact Best Buy for refunds.

recalls.Description: Cascade Designs has issued a recall for specific MSR camping cooking pots due to safety concerns. These anodized aluminum pots, available in 1- to 2-liter sizes, were sold individually and as part of various stove systems and kits. The affected models include Reactor, Trail Lite, and PocketRocket Stove Kits, identifiable by the MSR branding on the side.
recalls.Title: Cascade Designs Recalls MSR Camping Cooking Pots Over Burn and Scald Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Cascade Designs Inc. at 800-531-9531, available from 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. PT Monday through Friday. Additional information can be found online at https://www.msrgear.com/pot-recall.html or by visiting https://www.msrgear.com and clicking on the 'Recall Header' at the top of the page.

Products.Name: MSR Camping Cooking Pots
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 60,655 (In addition, about 22,320 were sold in Canada and about 35 were sold in Mexico)

Images.Caption: Recalled MSR Reactor Accessory cooking pot (1 liter)
Recalled MSR Trail Lite pot (2 liter)
Recalled MSR Reactor Stove System (1.7 liter)
Recalled MSR PocketRocket Stove Kit

Injuries.Name: The company has received 22 reports of the pot handle either detaching or becoming loose, including two reports of burn injuries.

Retailers.Name: Outdoor equipment stores nationwide from January 2008 through October 2023 for between $40 and $290.

Importers.Name: Cascade Designs Inc., of Seattle, Washington

Distributors.Name: Cascade Designs Inc., of Seattle, Washington

Hazards.Name: Pot handle may detach or loosen, leading to burn and scald hazards from hot food and liquids.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the recalled cooking pot and contact Cascade Designs for instructions on submitting a photo to obtain a free replacement pot handle/lifter, which is easy to install without tools.

seo.metaDescription: Cascade Designs recalls MSR camping cooking pots due to burn and scald hazards. Stop using and contact for a free replacement handle.
seo.ogTitle: Cascade Designs Recalls MSR Camping Cooking Pots Over Burn and Scald Risks

seo.twitterTitle: Cascade Designs Recalls MSR Camping Cooking Pots Over Burn and Scald Risks
seo.twitterDescription: Cascade Designs recalls MSR camping cooking pots due to burn and scald hazards. Stop using and contact for a free replacement handle.

recalls.Description: Electrolux Group is recalling specific Frigidaire rear-controlled ranges manufactured between October and November 2023. These ranges feature electronic control panels and include various model and serial numbers. Consumers can check if their unit is affected by visiting the Frigidaire recall website. The model and serial numbers can be found in the drawer beneath the oven.
recalls.Title: Electrolux Group Issues Recall for Frigidaire Rear-Controlled Ranges Due to Electric Shock Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Electrolux Group at 877-232-6822 from 8:30 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email rangeuirecall@electrolux.com, or visit www.rangeuirecall.com or www.frigidaire.com and select 'Recall Information' for further details.

Products.Name: Frigidaire rear-controlled ranges
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 1,800 (In addition, about 130 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Frigidaire rear-controlled ranges

Injuries.Name: None reported

Manufacturers.Name: Electrolux Home Products, Inc. of Charlotte, North Carolina

Retailers.Name: Lowe's and other appliance stores nationwide and online from October 2023 through December 2023 for between $790 and $1,050.

Hazards.Name: Risk of electric shock and electrocution due to potential detachment of the control panel.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the recalled ranges and contact Electrolux Group for a free repair or professional installation of a new control panel. Unplug the unit until it is serviced.

seo.metaDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire rear-controlled ranges due to electric shock hazards. Check if your model is affected and learn how to get a free repair.
seo.ogTitle: Electrolux Group Issues Recall for Frigidaire Rear-Controlled Ranges Due to Electric Shock Risks

seo.twitterDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire rear-controlled ranges due to electric shock hazards. Check if your model is affected and learn how to get a free repair.

recalls.Description: Electrolux Group is recalling specific Frigidaire side by side refrigerators equipped with Slim Ice buckets, produced between 2015 and 2019. The affected models include DGHK2355TF, DGHX2655TF, FFSC2323TS, FGSC2335TD, FGSC2335TF, FGSS2635TD, FGSS2635TE, FGSS2635TF, FGSS2635TP, FPSC2277RF, FPSC2278UF, FPSS2677RF, LFSC2324VF, LGHK2336TD, LGHK2336TF, LGHX2636TD, and LGHX2636TF. To check if your refrigerator is part of this recall, visit https://www.frigidaire.com/en/frigidaire-recall-information and enter your serial number, which can be found on the serial plate inside the refrigerator compartment. The last letter of each model number indicates its color: F and S for Stainless Steel, D for Dark Stainless Steel, E for Black Painted, and P for White Painted.
recalls.Title: Electrolux Group Issues Recall for Frigidaire Side by Side Refrigerators Due to Choking and Laceration Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Electrolux Group at 888-377-7563 from 8:30 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. You can also email IceBucketRecall@electrolux.com or visit www.icebucketrecall.com or www.frigidaire.com and click on 'Recall Information' for further details.

Products.Name: Frigidaire Side by Side Refrigerators with Slim Ice Buckets

Images.Caption: Recalled Production Year 2015-2019 Frigidaire Branded Side by Side Refrigerators with Slim Ice Buckets
Recalled Production Year 2015-2019 Frigidaire Branded Side by Side Refrigerators with Slim Ice Buckets

Injuries.Name: Electrolux Group has received 343 reports of plastic pieces breaking off, including two incidents resulting in laceration and ingestion injuries when the pieces were dispensed out of the recalled ice bucket.

Retailers.Name: Lowe's, Home Depot and other stores nationwide and online at Frigidaire.com from November 2015 through September 2019 for between $1,400 and $2,400.

Importers.Name: Electrolux Home Products Inc., of Charlotte, North Carolina

Hazards.Name: Choking and laceration hazards due to broken ice bucket assembly components

Remedies.Name: Request a free replacement ice bucket assembly component

seo.metaDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire side by side refrigerators due to choking and laceration hazards. Check your model and get a free replacement.
seo.ogTitle: Electrolux Group Issues Recall for Frigidaire Side by Side Refrigerators Due to Choking and Laceration Risks

seo.twitterDescription: Electrolux recalls Frigidaire side by side refrigerators due to choking and laceration hazards. Check your model and get a free replacement.

recalls.Description: BlendJet is recalling its BlendJet 2 Portable Blenders, which are available in various colors and designs. These blenders, measuring about 9.5 inches tall and 3 inches wide, weigh approximately 1.5 pounds. The serial numbers can be found on the bottom of the blender's base, marked with 'blendjet2' and 'The Original Portable Blender.' Units with serial numbers starting from 5201 to 5542 are included in this recall, and consumers can verify their product's status using the 'Is my BlendJet 2 Recalled?' tool on BlendJet's website.
recalls.Title: BlendJet Issues Recall for 4.8 Million BlendJet 2 Portable Blenders Due to Fire and Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach BlendJet at 844-334-0562 from 8 a.m. to 10 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit www.blendjet.com/safetyandrecall for more details and to access the recall information.

Products.Name: BlendJet 2 Portable Blenders
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 4.8 million (in addition, about 117,000 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled BlendJet 2 Portable Blender
Recalled BlendJet 2 complete packaging set
Recalled BlendJet 2 base of the blender, showing serial number

Remove and cut the rubber seal from the base of the recalled BlendJet 2 into three or more pieces and send a photo showing the serial number on the bottom of the unit and its rubber seal in pieces to BlendJet to receive the free replacement of the base

BlendJet 2 units with serial numbers where the first 4 digits are between 5201 and 5542 may be subject to the recall. Consumers should enter their unit's full serial number into this online tool found at www.blendjet.com/safetyandrecall

Injuries.Name: The firm has received approximately 329 reports of the blades breaking while in use, and an additional 17 reports of overheating or fires resulting in property damage claims of approximately $150,000. The firm has received about 49 reports of minor burns and one report of a laceration injury.

Retailers.Name: Costco, Walmart, Target and other stores nationwide and online at BlendJet.com from October 2020 through November 2023 for between $50 and $75.

Hazards.Name: Fire and laceration risks due to overheating and blender blade breakage.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the affected blenders and contact BlendJet for a complimentary replacement base unit. To facilitate this, they must cut the rubber seal from the base into multiple pieces and provide a photo showing the serial number and the seal pieces via the website or email.

seo.metaDescription: BlendJet recalls 4.8 million BlendJet 2 Portable Blenders due to fire and laceration hazards. Check if your blender is affected.
seo.ogTitle: BlendJet Issues Recall for 4.8 Million BlendJet 2 Portable Blenders Due to Fire and Injury Risks
seo.ogDescription: BlendJet recalls 4.8 million BlendJet 2 Portable Blenders due to fire and laceration hazards. Check if your blender is affected.
seo.twitterTitle: BlendJet Issues Recall for 4.8 Million BlendJet 2 Portable Blenders Due to Fire and Injury Risks
seo.twitterDescription: BlendJet recalls 4.8 million BlendJet 2 Portable Blenders due to fire and laceration hazards. Check if your blender is affected.

recalls.Description: Empower Brands has announced a recall of two models of the PowerXL dual-basket air fryers due to a burn hazard. These egg-shaped appliances feature two baskets that can be utilized independently or combined into a larger single basket. The recalled units are available in black or cinnamon and include the 10-quart DUAF-10 model, measuring approximately 17 inches long, 16 inches wide, and 12.5 inches tall, weighing around 14.5 pounds. The 9-quart DUAF-005 model measures about 14 inches long, 13 inches wide, and 15 inches tall, with a weight of about 14 pounds. Each air fryer displays a silver label with the name "PowerXL" on the front and a white label on the bottom or power cord indicating the model number.
recalls.Title: Empower Brands Issues Recall for Power XL Dual Basket Air Fryers Due to Potential Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled air fryers immediately and contact Empower Brands at 866-704-9370, available from 8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. Additional information can be found online at www.prodprotect.com/recall/duaf or https://powerxlproducts.com under the "Important Safety Recall Notice" section.

Images.Caption: Recalled PowerXL Air Fryer
Recalled PowerXL Model DUAF-10 Air Fryer

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 41 reports of the product breaking during use, including three reports of burns.

Retailers.Name: Target, Walmart, Kohls and other stores nationwide and online at www.target.com, www.walmart.com, www.kohls.com and other websites from August 2021 through October 2023 for between $60 and $190, depending on the model.

Importers.Name: Empower Brands, LLC of Middleton, Wisconsin

Hazards.Name: Potential burn hazard from breaking U-Channel connector

Remedies.Name: Full refund for recalled dual basket air fryers

seo.metaDescription: Recall alert: Power XL Dual Basket Air Fryers pose burn risks. Stop using and contact Empower Brands for a full refund.
